hero.title: Unmatched Cleanliness, Unbeatable Service
hero.subtitle: Experience the new standard in home and office cleaning. We deliver quality, reliability, and a pristine environment every time.

services.title: Post-Construction Cleaning
services.description: Remove fine dust, cement residue, and paint splashes. Deep clean floors, walls, and fixtures. Leave your space move-in ready.

services.title: Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning
services.description: Comprehensive cleaning for relocation. Clean cabinets, appliances, bathrooms, floors, and walls for a spotless handover.

services.title: Full Home Deep Cleaning
services.description: Top-to-bottom comprehensive clean. All rooms, furniture, and hard-to-reach areas thoroughly cleaned.

bn: সব শোয়ার ঘর ও বসার ঘর

services.title: Standard Home Cleaning
services.description: Regular maintenance cleaning. Dusting, sweeping, mopping, bathroom, and kitchen for a consistently clean home.

services.title: Kitchen Deep Cleaning
services.description: Remove grease, sanitize all surfaces, scrub sinks, polish appliances. Make your kitchen shine like new.

services.title: Sofa & Mattress Cleaning
services.description: Remove dust, stains, and odors from sofas and mattresses. Extend furniture life with professional deep cleaning.

services.title: Office & Commercial Cleaning
services.description: Professional cleaning for offices and shops. Desks, floors, windows, and restrooms for a productive environment.

services.title: Bathroom Deep Cleaning
services.description: Disinfect tiles, toilets, sinks, and showers. Remove stains and odors for a hygienic, sparkling bathroom.

faq.question: What services do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer Post-Construction, Move-In/Out, Full Home Deep Clean, Standard Home, Kitchen Deep Clean, Bathroom Deep Clean, Sofa & Mattress, and Office & Commercial cleaning.

faq.question: Are your products safe for children and pets?
faq.answer: Yes, we exclusively use eco-friendly, non-toxic, and biodegradable cleaning products completely safe for children and pets.

faq.question: Do I need to be home during cleaning?
faq.answer: No. Many clients provide a key or entry code. All our staff are fully vetted, trained, and insured for your peace of mind.

faq.question: What areas in Riyadh do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve all areas of Riyadh and surrounding regions including Diriyah, Al-Kharj, and Ad-Dilam.

faq.question: Do you operate 24/7?
faq.answer: Yes! We operate 24/7, including weekends and public holidays. Book anytime and our team will accommodate your schedule.

faq.question: How is pricing determined?
faq.answer: Pricing depends on your home size, service type, and current condition. Use our online price estimator for an instant quote.

about.story: Founded in Riyadh, ELEVATE BUILDERS LTD started with a simple mission: deliver cleaning services that are effective, trustworthy, and reliable. Through commitment to excellence, we grew into a leading name in the Riyadh cleaning industry.
about.mission: To deliver exceptional cleaning services through meticulous attention to detail, eco-friendly practices, and an unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction.
about.vision: To be the most trusted and respected cleaning service provider in the region, known for professionalism, reliability, and unwavering quality.

testimonials.name: Sarah Al-Amri
testimonials.text: ELEVATE BUILDERS LTD transformed my home! The team was professional, thorough, and left everything spotless. Highly recommend their deep cleaning service.

testimonials.name: Mohammed Al-Qahtani
testimonials.text: Best cleaning service in Riyadh. Highly recommended for post-construction cleaning. Very professional and efficient team.

testimonials.name: Layla Hassan
testimonials.text: Excellent service and great attention to detail. Worth every riyal. Will definitely book again.

testimonials.name: Omar Al-Rashid
testimonials.text: Used ELEVATE BUILDERS LTD for our office and the results exceeded expectations. Punctual, efficient team with zero mess left behind.

testimonials.name: Fatima Al-Zahrani
testimonials.text: Booked move-in cleaning for my new apartment and couldn't be happier. Everything was spotless and smelled fresh.
